channel.title: foss on Ticki's blog
channel.description: Recent content in foss on Ticki's blog

item.title: Why I'm leaving Open Source
item.description: Hi everyone, It is pretty hard to preface this. Open Source has been such a big part of my life for a long time. I have been working on Open Source projects, since I was 12 years old, and it used to be such a huge part of my day. I got home after a long day, then I proceeded spend several hours to work at projects, that fascinated me. The real bulk of my Open Source work, however, happened when I started writing in Rust in 2013.
